_comment: Model list with thinking mode variants. Models with -think suffix use reasoning.effort=medium.

qwq-32b-think.note: thinks natively, reasoning param causes HTTP 400

intellect-3-think.note: POST-TRAINING (not distillation): SFT + large-scale RL on GLM-4.5-Air-Base; same model size; reasoning is mandatory

deepseek-v3.1-nex-n1.note: POST-TRAINING (not distillation): nex-agi post-train of DeepSeek V3.1; same model size

gpt-5.5-pro.note: reasoning is mandatory; no non-thinking variant
